headline: Meet the Highest-Yielding Stock in the S&P 500. Does Its 10.2% Yield Make It a No-Brainer Buy for Dividend Investors?
summary: Conagra is a consumer staples company, but that fact shouldn't lull dividend investors into a false sense of security.
